🎬 arrstack-mcp

Discoverable via Agentic Resource Discovery (ARD).

This page hosts the ARD capability manifest for arrstack-mcp, an MCP server that exposes a homelab media and game stack (Sonarr, Radarr, Lidarr, Prowlarr, qBittorrent, SABnzbd, RDTClient, Jellyfin, RomM, GameVault, Bookshelf) as tools for AI assistants.

/.well-known/ai-catalog.json
ARD capability manifest — the entry point for registries and agents. /.well-known/mcp-server-card.json
MCP server card — every advertised tool and its input schema.

Agents can fetch the manifest directly:

curl -L ./.well-known/ai-catalog.json
Generated from server.py on each change. See the project README for details.
